task_completion.description: The scope of the junit dependency is changed to 'test'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the pom.xml file, the <dependency> block for 'junit' shows <scope>test</scope> instead of 'compile'.

task_completion.description: The duplicate joda-time dependency is removed, keeping only version 2.10.13.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the pom.xml file, there is only one <dependency> block for 'joda-time' and its <version> is '2.10.13'. The block for version '2.9.2' is no longer present.

task_completion.description: The commons-codec dependency is completely removed from pom.xml.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the pom.xml file, the <dependency> block for 'commons-codec' is no longer present.

task_completion.description: The project compiles successfully after the changes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal or IntelliJ Build window shows a successful compilation (e.g., 'BUILD SUCCESS' for maven compile/test, 'Build completed successfully', or tests running which implies successful compilation).

task_completion.description: All tests pass successfully after the changes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal or IntelliJ Run window shows tests passing (e.g., 'Tests run: X, Failures: 0', 'BUILD SUCCESS' for maven test, or green checkmarks in the IntelliJ test runner).

integrity.description: The agent used IntelliJ IDEA to edit the pom.xml file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show the IntelliJ IDEA interface being used to view and edit the pom.xml file.

integrity.description: The agent actually ran the compiler and tests.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show the output of a real build/test run in the terminal or IntelliJ tool windows, not just a text file or mock output.

integrity.description: No other dependencies or project settings were modified or removed.
integrity.visual_evidence: The pom.xml file does not show removal or modification of other necessary dependencies or plugins.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The project is 'data-processor'. The test-only dependency is 'junit' (needs scope 'test'). The duplicate dependency is 'joda-time' (keep version 2.10.13, remove 2.9.2). The unused dependency is 'commons-codec' (remove entirely). All changes must be made in pom.xml. Tests must pass after changes.
